channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Gallon close, 13th March
item.description:
The rd part of gallon close from the entrance from Woolwich rd up until the end of the close by the green between halo n and Hickin closes has pot holes and broken tarmac . It's making the whole rd very uneven .
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gallon Close, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double yellow lines blips blocking driveway, 13th March
item.description:
Blocking drive double yellow blips
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No mot or tax, 13th March
item.description:
This as been reported twice now and still nothing done about it it as no mot ran out in September 2025 no tax either parked in residents parking bay please remove ASAP thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chilver Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped Fridge Freezer, 13th March
item.description:
This was ghis afternoon the the middle of avenue Foad. Back now on the pavement for safety.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avenue Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Bike blocking pavement, 13th March

Lime bike in middle of pavement outside 65 Dressington Avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dressington Avenue, Ladywell, Greater London

item.title: Trip Hazard, 13th March
item.description:
Tree roots have lifted tarmac on pavement causing trip hazard ( I know I tripped )

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaumont Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Work done to fill sections of the pavement with tarmac, 13th March
item.description:
I am writing to express my concern regarding the recent pavement repairs carried out in my area. The work done to fill sections of the pavement with tarmac is, quite frankly, appalling. The finish is uneven and poorly matched to the surrounding surface, leaving the pavement looking untidy and potentially hazardous for pedestrians. This level of workmanship is disappointing and does not reflect the standard that residents should expect from maintenance work.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rojack Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A vehicle belonging to the residents of 83 Malthouse Drive is regularly parking on the grass verge., 13th March
item.description:
A vehicle belonging to the residents of 83 Malthouse Drive is regularly parking on the grass verge opposite the property. This happens almost every day and is causing damage to the grass verge. Please could the council investigate this and consider installing bollards or other measures to prevent vehicles from driving onto the grass.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Stifford, Grays
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip alley 262 Chipperfield Road, 13th March
item.description:
Significant amount of domestic waste dumped in the alley to 262 Chipperfield Road, it has been moved from 257 Chipperfield Road, opposite gate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 246-260, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing barrier o/s Long Lane Pasture N3, 13th March
item.description:
Recent contractors who did work on the trees further up the footpath recently have removed a barrier which prevents motorcyclists using the footpath. This was over 2 weeks ago, and it has now become a free for all. They have also left a hole in the pavement and other discarded signage.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Circular Road, Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: N1 7qh linale hse bins, 13th March
item.description:
Bins have not bern empited since 11/3/2026 now 13/3/2026 starting to overflow Weekend approaching plus House Furniture by Bin Area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Murray Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on rear of property, 13th March
item.description:
There’s graffiti on the rear of one of the houses opposite the way - they may not be aware but they’re on the other side of the railway and not known to us.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northumberland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
